name: Cajun Shrimp Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté for about four minutes until translucent.
3. Stir in garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add thyme, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and basil; stir to combine.
5. Cook the herbs for five more minutes, then add remaining ingredients except pasta, shrimp, and cheese.
6. Simmer on low heat for one hour, stirring occasionally.
7. Sauté shrimp in butter with garlic until three-quarters cooked (pink but not completely opaque).
8. Add tomatoes, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, sugar, green onions, and chicken stock to the pot.
9. Cook for two more minutes after adding shrimp.
10. Stir in pasta and cook for an additional minute or until pasta is tender.
11. Toss with grated cheese before serving.
12. Serve hot to 6 people.
